name: Strawberry-Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can plain yogurt (6 ounces), about 2/3 cup
2 cans mandarin oranges in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir 1 teaspoon strawberry gelatin powder and 1 teaspoon orange gelatin powder into yogurt; refrigerate.
2. Pour boiling water over the remaining strawberry and orange gelatin in a bowl; stir until gelatin is dissolved.
3. Stir in frozen strawberries; break apart with a fork.
4. Stir in grape juice; refrigerate until partially thickened.
5. Stir in mandarin orange segments.
6. Pour into a 6 cup ring mold; refrigerate until firm.
7. Unmold and serve on salad greens.
